command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "tail -20 /tmp/hermes/gateway.log 2>/dev/null || find /home/jose/.hermes/logs -name *.log -newer /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | xargs tail -20 2>/dev/null || sudo journalctl -u hermes-gateway --no-pager -n 20 -o short-precise 2>/dev/null | tail -20"
